task: MX-302A — Career Launchpad & Experience Routing · E2E (flag ON, live DB)

checks.name: careerLaunchpad flag is ON for this process
existing profiles resolve to a defined experience (flag ON, no throw)
checks.detail: exec-by-title → stage=executive (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=executive-studio · senior-by-title → stage=senior-leadership (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=leadership-studio · midcareer-by-years → stage=mid-career (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=command-center · early-by-years → stage=early-career (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=launchpad · graduate-by-zero-years → stage=graduate (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=launchpad · senior-by-experience-title → stage=senior-leadership (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=leadership-studio · midcareer-by-has-experience → stage=mid-career (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=command-center · empty-profile-present-row → stage=graduate (stored=false, derived=true) → exp=launchpad

checks.name: no-profile-row returning user defaults to Career Launchpad (not Command Center), no throw
checks.detail: no-row → stage=null stored=false derived=false → exp=launchpad (want null → launchpad, NOT command-center)

checks.name: student platform role derives a real stage with no profile row (role signal wired)
checks.detail: no-row+student-role → stage=student stored=false derived=true → exp=launchpad (want student → launchpad via role signal)
